$comment: Catalog entry for the Anthropic plugin marketplace. Submit at https://claude.ai/settings/plugins/submit. Schema is provisional — refine against the official submission requirements before publishing.
name: expression
summary: Spreadsheet-as-DAG modeling skills and commands for the `expression` CLI.
description: Build, iterate on, and export financial / planning models written as Python DAGs. Ships eight skills (bottom-up modeling, parameter elicitation, override discipline, circularity resolution, Excel fidelity, import-excel, small-step iteration, harness adapter) plus slash commands wrapping `expression run`, `diff`, `show`, `explain`, and `export`.
